Package org.apache.gravitino.function

package org.apache.gravitino.function
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.gravitino
     
  • Class
    Description
    Function
    An interface representing a user-defined function under a schema Namespace.
    FunctionCatalog
    The FunctionCatalog interface defines the public API for managing functions in a schema.
    FunctionChange
    Represents a change that can be applied to a function.
    FunctionChange.AddDefinition
    A FunctionChange to add a new definition to a function.
    FunctionChange.AddImpl
    A FunctionChange to add an implementation to a definition.
    FunctionChange.RemoveDefinition
    A FunctionChange to remove an existing definition from a function.
    FunctionChange.RemoveImpl
    A FunctionChange to remove an implementation for a specific runtime.
    FunctionChange.UpdateComment
    A FunctionChange to update the comment of a function.
    FunctionChange.UpdateImpl
    A FunctionChange to replace an implementation (identified by runtime) for a specific definition.
    FunctionColumn
    Represents a return column of a table-valued function.
    FunctionDefinition
    A function definition that pairs a specific parameter list with its implementations and return type.
    FunctionDefinitions
    Helper methods to create FunctionDefinition instances.
    FunctionImpl
    Base class of function implementations.
    FunctionImpl.Language
    Supported implementation languages.
    FunctionImpl.RuntimeType
    Supported execution runtimes for function implementations.
    FunctionImpls
    Helper methods to create FunctionImpl instances.
    FunctionParam
    Represents a function parameter.
    FunctionParams
    Helper methods to create FunctionParam instances.
    FunctionResources
    Represents external resources that are required by a function implementation.
    FunctionType
    Function type supported by Gravitino.
    JavaImpl
    Java implementation with class name.
    PythonImpl
    Python implementation with handler and optional inline code.
    SQLImpl
    SQL implementation with runtime and SQL body.
